text: Someone please help us we are stuck on our roof the water is rising fast in downtown area
Just felt the ground shake for like 30 seconds straight. That was terrifying.
My grandmother is trapped under rubble at 45 Oak Street please send rescue teams immediately
Massive fire spreading through the hills right now, sky is completely orange
We need water and food badly, been stranded for 2 days after the flood. 3 kids with us
Praying for everyone affected by the earthquake. Stay safe out there
PLEASE my dad is having a heart attack and the roads are flooded we cant get to hospital someone help
The cyclone just ripped the roof off our neighbor's house. Unbelievable destruction
Trapped in our apartment building 3rd floor, fire below us, cant get out through stairwell
Reports coming in of a 6.2 magnitude earthquake near the coast. Tsunami warning issued.
Does anyone have insulin?? My wife is diabetic and we lost all our supplies in the flood
Explosion at the chemical plant just shook our entire neighborhood windows shattered everywhere
We are 5 people stuck in a car surrounded by floodwater on highway 9 please send boats
Can't believe what I'm seeing. The entire block is just gone after that explosion
Need urgent medical help my son has a deep cut and is bleeding badly, no ambulance can reach us
Watching the wildfire coverage on TV. This is absolutely devastating for those communities
Please anyone in the riverside area we need rescue there are elderly people here who cant swim
Third earthquake aftershock in the last hour. Buildings are visibly cracked all over downtown
Our building collapsed partially, my neighbor is pinned under concrete, we need heavy equipment NOW
The cyclone has officially made landfall. Wind speeds exceeding 150mph
Running out of baby formula stuck in evacuation shelter someone please bring supplies
Firefighters are doing an incredible job battling this blaze. Heroes every single one of them
SOS we are on the roof of the school near market street, water level is at second floor
Just saw footage of the flood damage. Entire streets turned into rivers. Heartbreaking
My mother is trapped alone in her house after the earthquake she cant move please help her at 12 Pine Rd
Gas leak reported near the explosion site. Authorities telling everyone to evacuate immediately
Desperately need someone to rescue my two dogs from our flooded house on Elm Street
Nature is truly terrifying. That cyclone footage is something out of a movie
Fire surrounded our farm no way out, 4 adults and 2 children here please send helicopter
The earthquake just woke up the entire city. Everyone outside in pajamas at 3am
Haven't eaten in 3 days after the cyclone destroyed everything. Anyone bringing food to the south side?
Smoke so thick you can barely see 10 feet in front of you. Air quality must be insane right now
HELP theres a pregnant woman in labor here and the hospital is inaccessible because of flooding
Second explosion heard from the industrial zone. Sirens everywhere. Stay away from that area
Can someone bring a generator to Cedar Park shelter? We have people on oxygen who need power
Sending love and prayers to everyone dealing with this earthquake aftermath. We will rebuild
My leg is broken and im alone in my apartment the staircase collapsed in the quake pls help me
Fire department says the wildfire has burned over 10,000 acres since yesterday morning
Whole family on the second floor water still rising fast someone with a boat please come to Maple Ave
The sound of that explosion was unlike anything I've ever heard. Felt it in my chest
Need blood donors type O negative at the emergency clinic near city hall after the earthquake
Cyclone season is no joke this year. Stay prepared everyone
Stuck under debris cant feel my legs someone please come to the warehouse district building 7
Watching ash fall like snow from this wildfire. Surreal and scary
We need blankets and dry clothes at the church shelter on 5th street after the flood
Just drove through the evacuation zone. Cars abandoned everywhere. Looks like a war zone
My child has asthma and the smoke from the fire is making it impossible to breathe need masks or inhaler
Power has been out for 18 hours now since the cyclone. No word on when it's coming back
Three of us are clinging to a tree in the floodwater near the bridge on route 7 PLEASE HURRY
The earthquake cracked the dam upstream. Officials are monitoring it closely
Burns on my arms from the fire need medical treatment badly nobody is coming to our area
Can we talk about how climate change is making these disasters worse every single year?
If anyone has a satellite phone in the flood zone please contact rescue for us at the community center
Incredible how fast the floodwaters rose. Streets were dry an hour ago now they're rivers
Elderly man alone at 88 Washington Blvd needs evacuation, hes in wheelchair cant leave on his own
That explosion lit up the entire sky. People 20 miles away said they heard it
Our shelter ran out of drinking water hours ago. Over 200 people here including children pls help
Donating to relief efforts today. If you can help even a little it makes a difference
Pinned inside my car after the building next to me collapsed from the earthquake someone help me
Fire jumped the containment line. Evacuation orders now extended to the entire valley
Anyone with a boat in the marina area?? Family of 6 stranded on second floor Adams Street
The cyclone is weakening but the damage is already catastrophic. Recovery will take years
I'm a nurse trapped in the collapsed clinic on Main St. Several injured patients here need extraction
Aftershocks keep coming. Too scared to go back inside any building right now
Our water supply is contaminated after the flood. Kids are getting sick need clean water urgently
Satellite images of the wildfire spread are just insane. You can see it from space
Gas line ruptured in our neighborhood from the quake. Smell is overwhelming, people feeling dizzy, need help
Remember to check on your neighbors during disasters especially the elderly and those living alone
Diabetic going into shock at the flood evacuation point on harbor road no medics here yet
Explosion at the refinery is now a 4-alarm fire. Multiple agencies responding
We climbed a cell tower to escape the flood but we cant hold on much longer send rescue to junction road
This is the worst fire season anyone can remember. Absolutely devastating
Collapsed wall has someone trapped at the old textile factory after the explosion. Can hear them calling
Cyclone path shifted. Towns that thought they were safe are now in the direct path
Oxygen tank running low for my father on life support. Power out since the cyclone. URGENT HELP NEEDED
Volunteers are amazing. Saw people forming human chains to rescue flood victims
Im at the rooftop of Grand Hotel with about 30 guests flood has taken the ground floor completely help us
The earthquake measured 7.1 according to USGS. Strongest one this region has felt in decades
My baby needs formula and diapers desperately we are stuck at the overpass after fleeing the fire
Eerie silence after the cyclone passed. Then you hear the damage. Roofs torn off, trees down everywhere
Broken arm from earthquake debris still waiting for any kind of medical response at Lincoln Park
The floodwater is receding but the mud and destruction left behind is unimaginable
Two families stuck in attic at corner of 3rd and Broadway water up to the ceiling of first floor help
Local business owners lost everything in the fire. GoFundMe links in my bio if you want to support
Need someone to bring epinephrine to the school gym shelter my daughter is having severe allergic reaction
Explosion caused a massive crater in the middle of the street. Gas mains are compromised
Stranded on a small patch of dry ground with rising water all around us near the old bridge SEND HELP
Fire crews from 3 states now deployed. The scale of this wildfire is unprecedented
Critical need for tetanus shots at the makeshift hospital after earthquake. Lots of puncture wounds
Thinking about all the pets that get separated from families during floods. So sad
My house is gone from the cyclone and we are sleeping in our car with 3 kids need shelter anywhere
Before and after satellite photos of the earthquake zone are absolutely shocking
Bleeding from head wound after explosion debris hit me. Waiting at gas station on commerce blvd for any medic
Schools closed indefinitely after the flood. Kids have nowhere to go
Fire closing in on our ranch. Livestock still in the barn. If anyone can help us evacuate the animals please
The death toll from the earthquake keeps climbing. This is just devastating news
Wheelchair bound and alone on my porch as floodwater rises. 240 Cherry Lane. Someone please come
Respect to all the first responders working 24 hour shifts during this wildfire. True courage
Apartment complex on fire, people jumping from windows. We need more fire trucks at Sunset Towers NOW
Cyclone damage assessment is going to take weeks. Infrastructure completely wrecked
Lost contact with my sister after earthquake she was in the parking garage on 7th if anyone sees her please
Watched the tornado form right in front of us. Never been so scared in my entire life
10 month old baby with high fever at flood shelter on Oak Park, no medicine available, anyone can help?
Insurance companies are going to have a nightmare dealing with the claims from this fire
Buried under rubble but I can reach my phone. I'm at the corner of 5th and Main near the bank building
The sound of the cyclone at its peak was like a freight train that wouldn't stop. Absolutely terrifying
Flood cut off our village completely. No road access, no phone signal except this one spot. 50+ people need evacuation
Property values in the fire zone are going to crater. Feel terrible for homeowners
My grandfather is missing since the earthquake. Last seen near the collapsed market on King Street please help find him
Amazing to see communities coming together after the flood. People helping strangers without hesitation
Chemical burns from explosion debris. Eyes are burning badly. Nearest hospital is destroyed. Where do I go??
Mandatory evacuation order now covers the entire county due to wildfire spread
We are 8 construction workers stuck on scaffolding, building partially collapsed from quake, cant get down
Just donated blood for earthquake victims. If you're able to please do the same
Floodwater brought snakes into our shelter and a child was bitten need antivenom immediately
Every time I see wildfire footage I think about the wildlife that has nowhere to go. Heartbreaking
Husband trapped in elevator in partially collapsed building after earthquake. 900 block of Victoria Ave PLS HELP
Power grid took a massive hit from the cyclone. Could be weeks before full restoration
Running low on heart medication at the evacuation center on Springfield Road. Anyone have atenolol?
These floods are a direct consequence of poor urban planning and deforestation. We need to do better
Fire engulfed the entire east wing of our apartment. Family of 4 trapped on the balcony west side HELP
Search and rescue dogs are incredible. Watched one locate a survivor under 6 feet of rubble
Please we need tarps and plastic sheeting at the cyclone shelter. Rain is getting in and people are soaked
The explosion registered on seismographs 50 miles away. That tells you how massive it was
Asthma attack getting worse from wildfire smoke. No inhaler. Stuck at rest stop off exit 14 someone please
Boil water advisory issued for the entire flood-affected region. Do not drink tap water
Group of hikers stranded on the ridge trail by wildfire. 6 of us. No way down. Need air rescue
Haven't slept in two days because of earthquake aftershocks. Every little tremor sends your heart racing
Severe dehydration hitting elderly at our flood shelter. No water delivery for over 24 hours someone please bring water
Drone footage of the cyclone aftermath is just unreal. Entire neighborhoods flattened
Carbon monoxide filling our basement after explosion damaged the ventilation. 3 people unconscious need paramedics at 67 Lake Dr
Remember the earthquake in 2019? This one is even worse. Unbelievable
I can see people waving from rooftops all along River Road but no boats are coming someone coordinate rescue please
Wildlife sanctuary completely burned down in the fire. All those animals. I can't stop crying
Crushed leg from fallen beam in earthquake. Losing a lot of blood. Corner of Davis and Park. ANYONE
The government response to this flood has been embarrassingly slow. People are suffering
Baby born at the cyclone shelter 2 hours ago. Mother bleeding heavily. No medical staff here. HELP US
Red Cross has set up relief stations at three locations. Check their website for details
Gas leak after the earthquake and we can't evacuate because my wife can't walk. 55 Birch Lane please send help
Just realized how unprepared I was for this flood. Everyone needs an emergency kit ready at all times
Fire jumped to our street. Garden hose isn't going to cut it. Family evacuating on foot toward the park NEED PICKUP
Satellite imagery shows the flood covers an area larger than some small countries. Staggering scale
Dialysis patient at Valley View shelter hasn't had treatment in 3 days. This is life threatening someone please arrange transport
The courage of ordinary people during disasters always restores my faith in humanity
Explosion shrapnel hit several of us near the factory gates. Multiple injuries. No ambulance yet. Industrial Blvd entrance
Cell towers down across the entire region after the cyclone. Communication is nearly impossible
Trapped in a storm drain after the flood swept me in. Can see daylight above but can't climb out. Near the mall
Teachers sheltered 200 kids during the earthquake and kept every single one safe. Give those teachers a raise
Critical shortage of tourniquets and bandages at the earthquake field hospital on Grant Ave. Medical supplies needed ASAP
Fire danger remains extreme today. Please do not use any open flames or fireworks
Clinging to a telephone pole as flood rushes past. Getting weaker. Between 4th and 5th on River Rd help me
Mental health support is so important after disasters. Don't forget to check in on people emotionally too
Toddler with severe diarrhea at flood camp needs oral rehydration salts or IV fluids immediately
Firefighters working without sleep, eating on the move. Absolute legends
Hearing voices under the rubble at the collapsed apartment on Bedford St. Multiple people still alive need rescue teams
The economic impact of this cyclone will be felt for a generation. Billions in damage
Lost my wheelchair in the flood and I'm sitting in mud. Someone please help me get to shelter. Near the overpass on route 3
Time lapse video of the fire spreading through the canyon is both beautiful and horrifying
Need rescue helicopter at Mt Vista trailhead. Forest fire blocked all exits. 12 campers including children
The earthquake damaged the water treatment plant. Might be days before safe water is restored
Please someone help my cat is stuck on the second floor of our flooded house on Willow Lane I cant get back in
Every disaster reminds us how fragile our infrastructure really is. We need to invest in resilience
Explosion caused partial building collapse. At least 4 of us trapped in the stairwell. 200 Commerce Way floor 3
Incredible moment caught on camera of a man rescuing a dog from the floodwaters. Heroes walk among us
Haven't had clean water for 4 days since cyclone. Drinking rainwater but kids are getting sick. Need help at Coconut Grove area
Comparing this earthquake to historical ones and it's among the top 10 strongest ever recorded here
Severe chest pain after inhaling explosion fumes. Others here also coughing blood. Factory district needs medics NOW
Neighbors evacuating with just the clothes on their backs. This fire is taking everything
12 people on a collapsing roof. Structure cracking from flood pressure. Urgent rescue needed at Old Mill building riverside
The before and after photos of this flood tell the whole story. Devastating doesn't begin to describe it
Teen with broken ribs from earthquake debris having trouble breathing. At the park on Chestnut, no medics in sight
If you're in a safe area consider opening your home to displaced families from the fire zones
SOS from rooftop of Harbor Point apartments. Over 20 residents trapped by flood. Children and elderly. Water still rising
This cyclone season has broken multiple records already and we're only halfway through
Need someone with chainsaw skills. Trees blocking the road to our injured neighbor after the cyclone. Oakdale Lane
Watching the news coverage of the earthquake rescue efforts. Every life saved is a miracle
Woman in labor at the flooded intersection of King and George. Ambulance can't get through. Any doctors nearby??
The smell after a flood recedes is something nobody warns you about. Mold and decay everywhere
Burns covering both arms from wildfire. Skin peeling off. At the junction rest area. Please send medical help immediately
Scientists warned about this exact earthquake fault line for years. Nobody listened
Group of seniors at Sunrise nursing home abandoned during flood evacuation. Staff left. 15 residents need help NOW
Just felt another aftershock. When does this end. Sleeping outside for the third night
Factory worker here. Colleague lost his hand in the explosion. We stopped the bleeding but he needs surgery ASAP. Gate B entrance
The resilience of people who rebuild after every disaster is both inspiring and heartbreaking
Floodwater contaminated with sewage and chemicals. Getting skin rashes and infections. Need medical supplies at Community Hall
Air quality index off the charts from the wildfire smoke. Stay indoors if you can
Partially deaf from the explosion blast. Ears bleeding. Sitting on curb outside what used to be the warehouse. Need medic
Donating old clothes and non-perishables to the cyclone relief drive. Every bit helps
Flood took our car and everything inside. Family of 5 at the bridge overpass with nothing. Please someone
The earthquake exposed how many buildings were not up to code. Criminal negligence
Fire is 50 meters from our property. Hose pressure dropping. If we lose water we lose everything. Need fire dept at Hilltop Ranch
These floods remind me why I always keep an emergency bag packed by the door
Collapse at the shopping center from earthquake. Can hear people screaming from under the debris. Northgate Mall please send crews
Volunteers distributing hot meals at the cyclone shelter. Thank you to everyone who cooked and contributed
Stuck waist deep in mud after the flood. Cant free myself. Getting hypothermic. Near the train tracks south of town HELP
The way this fire moves with the wind is genuinely scary. Embers flying a mile ahead of the fire line
4 year old separated from parents during flood evacuation. She's with us at the church on MLK Blvd. Please spread the word
City council needs to answer for why the levees failed. This flood was preventable
Explosion knocked me unconscious. Woke up alone in the rubble. Think my back is broken. Near the loading dock at Port Industrial
The human spirit is remarkable. Even in the worst disasters people find ways to help each other
